info.title: M8 Platform IAM API
info.description: Identity and OAuth facade for the M8 Platform IAM control plane.

get.summary: GetAuditEvent returns one audit event by identifier.

post.summary: SetAccessBindings replaces the desired binding set for a resource.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: SetAccessBindingsRequest replaces the desired binding set for a resource.

post.summary: UpdateAccessBindings applies an incremental binding mutation set.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: UpdateAccessBindingsRequest applies an incremental mutation set to bindings.

post.summary: CheckAccess evaluates a single permission.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CheckAccessRequest evaluates one permission for one subject and resource.

post.summary: BatchCheckAccess evaluates multiple permissions in one call.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: BatchCheckAccessRequest evaluates a batch of permission checks.

post.summary: ExplainAccess returns an explanation for the authorization decision.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ExplainAccessRequest asks IAM to explain why a decision was made.

post.summary: SimulateChangeImpact estimates the effects of a binding delta.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: SimulateChangeImpactRequest estimates permission changes from a binding delta.

post.summary: ListResourceSubjects returns subjects bound to a resource.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ListResourceSubjectsRequest lists subjects bound to one resource.

post.summary: ListSubjectAccessBindings returns bindings reachable from a subject.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ListSubjectAccessBindingsRequest lists bindings for one subject.

post.summary: AddGroupMember adds a subject to a group.
RemoveGroupMember removes a subject from a group.

patch.summary: UpdateOAuthClient updates mutable OAuth client fields.

get.summary: GetOAuthClient returns a single OAuth client.

post.summary: RotateClientSecret rotates a confidential client secret.

patch.summary: UpdateServiceAccount updates mutable service account fields.

get.summary: GetServiceAccount returns a single service account.

post.summary: ApproveTemporaryAccess approves a pending support grant.
RevokeTemporaryAccess revokes an existing support grant.

get.summary: ListTenants returns all tenants visible to IAM.

post.summary: CreateTenant creates a tenant.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateTenantRequest creates a new tenant record.

get.summary: ListAuditEvents returns audit events for a tenant.
ListGroups returns the groups in a tenant.

post.summary: CreateGroup creates a new group.

get.summary: ListMemberships returns memberships for a tenant.

post.summary: CreateMembership creates a tenant membership.

get.summary: ListOAuthClients returns OAuth clients for a tenant.

post.summary: CreateOAuthClient provisions a new OAuth client.

get.summary: ListOperations returns operations for a tenant.
ListServiceAccounts returns service accounts for a tenant.

post.summary: CreateServiceAccount provisions a new service account.

get.summary: ListSupportGrants returns grants for a tenant.

post.summary: GrantTemporaryAccess creates a new support grant request.

get.summary: ListUsers returns the users that belong to a tenant.

post.summary: CreateUser creates a user inside a tenant.

get.summary: GetUser returns a single user by identifier.

post.summary: DisableUser disables a user account.

IdentityServiceAddGroupMemberBody.description: AddGroupMemberRequest adds a subject to a group.

IdentityServiceCreateGroupBody.description: CreateGroupRequest creates a new tenant group.

IdentityServiceCreateMembershipBody.description: CreateMembershipRequest assigns roles to a user in a tenant.

IdentityServiceCreateServiceAccountBody.description: CreateServiceAccountRequest provisions a new machine principal.

IdentityServiceCreateUserBody.description: CreateUserRequest creates a new user record in IAM metadata.

IdentityServiceRemoveGroupMemberBody.description: RemoveGroupMemberRequest removes a subject from a group.

group.description: Group stores a reusable tenant-scoped subject collection.

service_account.description: ServiceAccount stores metadata for a machine principal managed by IAM.

IdentityServiceUpdateServiceAccountBody.description: UpdateServiceAccountRequest updates mutable service account fields.

tenant.description: Tenant stores tenant metadata known to the IAM domain.

user.description: User stores IAM user metadata replicated into the control plane.

OAuthFacadeServiceCreateOAuthClientBody.description: CreateOAuthClientRequest provisions a new OAuth client.

OAuthFacadeServiceRotateClientSecretBody.description: RotateClientSecretRequest rotates the secret for a confidential OAuth client.

oauth_client.description: OAuthClient stores metadata for an OAuth/OIDC client provisioned through IAM.

OAuthFacadeServiceUpdateOAuthClientBody.description: UpdateOAuthClientRequest updates mutable OAuth client fields.

SupportAccessServiceApproveTemporaryAcce.description: ApproveTemporaryAccessRequest approves a pending support grant.

SupportAccessServiceGrantTemporaryAccess.description: GrantTemporaryAccessRequest requests a temporary support grant.

SupportAccessServiceRevokeTemporaryAcces.description: RevokeTemporaryAccessRequest revokes an active or pending support grant.

opsV1Operation.description: Operation stores the current state of an asynchronous action.

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

v1AccessBinding.description: AccessBinding binds a subject to a resource with a role.

v1AccessBindingDelta.description: AccessBindingDelta groups binding mutations to apply atomically.

v1AccessBindingMutation.description: AccessBindingMutation describes a single add or remove operation on a binding.

v1AccessCheckResult.description: AccessCheckResult returns the outcome of a permission evaluation.

v1AuditEvent.description: AuditEvent records a completed security-relevant action.

v1BatchCheckAccessRequest.description: BatchCheckAccessRequest evaluates a batch of permission checks.

v1BatchCheckAccessResponse.description: BatchCheckAccessResponse returns the results for a batch check call.

v1BindingMutationKind.description: BindingMutationKind describes how a binding set should be changed.

v1ChangeImpact.description: ChangeImpact describes how a subject's permissions would change.

v1CheckAccessRequest.description: CheckAccessRequest evaluates one permission for one subject and resource.

v1CreateTenantRequest.description: CreateTenantRequest creates a new tenant record.

v1ExplainAccessRequest.description: ExplainAccessRequest asks IAM to explain why a decision was made.

v1ExplainAccessResponse.description: ExplainAccessResponse returns the decision and the matching path identifiers.

v1ExplainEdge.description: ExplainEdge describes one edge in a derived access path.

v1Group.description: Group stores a reusable tenant-scoped subject collection.

v1GroupMember.description: GroupMember stores a single subject membership inside a group.

v1ListAuditEventsResponse.description: ListAuditEventsResponse returns a page of audit events.

v1ListGroupsResponse.description: ListGroupsResponse returns a page of groups.

v1ListMembershipsResponse.description: ListMembershipsResponse returns a page of memberships.

v1ListOAuthClientsResponse.description: ListOAuthClientsResponse returns a page of OAuth clients.

v1ListOperationsResponse.description: ListOperationsResponse returns a page of operations.

v1ListResourceSubjectsRequest.description: ListResourceSubjectsRequest lists subjects bound to one resource.

v1ListResourceSubjectsResponse.description: ListResourceSubjectsResponse returns subjects and bindings for a resource.

v1ListRolesResponse.description: ListRolesResponse returns a page of roles.

v1ListServiceAccountsResponse.description: ListServiceAccountsResponse returns a page of service accounts.

v1ListSubjectAccessBindingsRequest.description: ListSubjectAccessBindingsRequest lists bindings for one subject.

v1ListSubjectAccessBindingsResponse.description: ListSubjectAccessBindingsResponse returns subject bindings and explain edges.

v1ListSupportGrantsResponse.description: ListSupportGrantsResponse returns a page of support grants.

v1ListTenantsResponse.description: ListTenantsResponse returns a page of tenants.

v1ListUsersResponse.description: ListUsersResponse returns a page of users.

v1Membership.description: Membership stores the tenant-scoped roles assigned to a user.

v1MembershipState.description: MembershipState describes the lifecycle state of a tenant membership.

v1MutateIdentityResponse.description: MutateIdentityResponse returns the operation identifier created by a mutation.

v1OAuthClient.description: OAuthClient stores metadata for an OAuth/OIDC client provisioned through IAM.

v1OAuthClientType.description: OAuthClientType describes the client profile provisioned in Keycloak.

v1OperationStatus.description: OperationStatus describes the execution state of an operation.

v1Permission.description: Permission describes a concrete action exposed by a role.

v1PermissionDecision.description: PermissionDecision describes the result of a permission evaluation.

v1ResourceRef.description: ResourceRef identifies the protected object participating in authorization.

v1ResourceType.description: ResourceType enumerates resource categories governed by IAM permissions.

v1Role.description: Role describes a reusable set of permissions and backing relation names.

v1RotateClientSecretResponse.description: RotateClientSecretResponse returns the new operation and secret reference.

v1ServiceAccount.description: ServiceAccount stores metadata for a machine principal managed by IAM.

v1SetAccessBindingsRequest.description: SetAccessBindingsRequest replaces the desired binding set for a resource.

v1SetAccessBindingsResponse.description: SetAccessBindingsResponse returns the resulting bindings and operation identifier.

v1SimulateChangeImpactRequest.description: SimulateChangeImpactRequest estimates permission changes from a binding delta.

v1SimulateChangeImpactResponse.description: SimulateChangeImpactResponse returns the simulated impact per subject.

v1SubjectRef.description: SubjectRef identifies the actor participating in a permission check or binding.

v1SubjectType.description: SubjectType enumerates principal categories supported by IAM authorization.

v1SupportGrant.description: SupportGrant records a temporary elevated-access request and its outcome.

v1SupportGrantStatus.description: SupportGrantStatus describes the lifecycle of a temporary support grant.

v1Tenant.description: Tenant stores tenant metadata known to the IAM domain.

v1UpdateAccessBindingsRequest.description: UpdateAccessBindingsRequest applies an incremental mutation set to bindings.

v1UpdateAccessBindingsResponse.description: UpdateAccessBindingsResponse returns the resulting bindings and operation identifier.

v1User.description: User stores IAM user metadata replicated into the control plane.

v1UserState.description: UserState describes the lifecycle state of a user account.
